tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication endpoints including registration, login, OTP verification, password reset, and session management

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User management endpoints for CRUD operations, role assignment, avatar management, and username availability checks

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: Role-based access control (RBAC) endpoints for managing roles, permissions, and role-menu access mapping

tags.name: Permissions
tags.description: Granular permission management endpoints for defining module:action permissions

tags.name: MenuGroups
tags.description: Menu group management endpoints for organizing navigation structure with hierarchical parent-child relationships

tags.name: Tenants
tags.description: Tenant (organization) management endpoints including CRUD, settings, and configuration

tags.name: TenantBackup
tags.description: Tenant backup and restore operations including full backups, user-only backups, and schedule management

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Session management endpoints including user sessions, cleanup, and expiration handling

tags.name: Migration
tags.description: Internal migration and seeding operations (development only) for database schema updates and initial data population

tags.name: Stock
tags.description: Stock management endpoints for inventory tracking, adjustments, transfers between warehouses, and periodic opname (counting)

tags.name: Warehouse
tags.description: Warehouse management endpoints for physical locations and storage locations (shelves, bins, racks)

tags.name: Certificates
tags.description: Certificate management endpoints for generating, approving, signing, and revoking calibration certificates (ISO 17025, KARS, SNARS compliance)

tags.name: CalibrationDevices
tags.description: Calibration device management endpoints for tracking instruments, their specifications, and calibration schedules

tags.name: CalibrationRecords
tags.description: Calibration record management endpoints for recording calibration results, methods, standards, and compliance

tags.name: MeteredBilling
tags.description: Metered billing and usage analytics endpoints for tracking resource consumption, cost estimation, and usage alerts

tags.name: CustomDomains
tags.description: Custom domain and vanity subdomain management endpoints for DNS configuration and verification

tags.name: GDPR/CCPA
tags.description: Data privacy compliance endpoints for GDPR/CCPA including data export, erasure requests, consent management, and processing restrictions

tags.name: TenantHierarchy
tags.description: Parent-tenant to child business unit hierarchy management endpoints including tree traversal and cross-tenant role assignments

tags.name: ESignature
tags.description: Digital signature workflow management endpoints for 21 CFR Part 11 compliance including key pair generation, workflow management, and signature verification

tags.name: QMS
tags.description: Quality Management System endpoints for non-conformances (NC) and corrective/preventive actions (CAPA)

tags.name: SOP
tags.description: Standard Operating Procedure endpoints for controlled documents and tenant-wide training acknowledgment

tags.name: Risk
tags.description: Risk register endpoints (ISO 14971): risk assessment with severity × likelihood scoring and mitigation tracking

tags.name: SupplierScorecard
tags.description: Supplier performance scorecard endpoints for periodic quality/delivery/service evaluation of vendors

tags.name: Maintenance
tags.description: Maintenance work-order endpoints (preventive, breakdown, repair) for calibration devices

tags.name: PredictiveMaintenance
tags.description: Predictive maintenance endpoints: IoT anomaly analysis and calibration-interval recommendations

tags.name: IoT
tags.description: IoT telemetry ingestion endpoints (device-token authenticated) with anomaly detection against reading tolerances

tags.name: AI
tags.description: AI assistant endpoints: certificate OCR extraction and retrieval-augmented (RAG) document Q&A

tags.name: FeatureFlags
tags.description: Per-tenant feature flag endpoints for evaluating, overriding, and initializing capability toggles

tags.name: TenantLifecycle
tags.description: Tenant lifecycle endpoints: suspension, resumption, grace period, offboarding, and data export

tags.name: DataRetention
tags.description: Data retention & privacy governance endpoints: retention policies, legal hold, purge, PII masking, and anonymization

tags.name: OIDC
tags.description: OpenID Connect provider endpoints: discovery, JWKS, and dynamic client registration/rotation

tags.name: WebAuthn
tags.description: WebAuthn / FIDO passwordless endpoints for security-key registration and assertion verification

tags.name: NetworkSecurity
tags.description: Network security endpoints: per-tenant IP allowlist (CIDR), geofencing, and login evaluation

tags.name: SCIM
tags.description: SCIM 2.0 provisioning endpoints for automated Users and Groups lifecycle from an external IdP

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Super Admin backend management endpoints

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Tenant-scoped API keys / service accounts

tags.name: Attachments
tags.description: Tenant-scoped file/document storage

tags.name: SSO
tags.description: Single Sign-On (SSO) and SAML integration endpoints for enterprise authentication

tags.name: BatchJobs
tags.description: Durable job runner for background tasks

tags.name: Content
tags.description: Blog & News content management (platform-global, super-admin authored)

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Aggregated dashboard metrics (tenant-scoped; global for SUPERADMIN)

tags.name: Finance
tags.description: Asset finance records and depreciation reporting for calibration devices

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Tenant-scoped analytics and reporting

tags.name: UserPermissions
tags.description: Per-user permission overrides (role inheritance + custom grants/denies)

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Outbound webhook subscriptions + delivery log

tags.name: Workflows
tags.description: Custom approval workflow engine — dynamic approval chains for certificates, stock transfers, and maintenance work orders

post.description: Extracts structured data from an uploaded certificate image or PDF. Requires authentication.
Answers a question over indexed documents using retrieval-augmented generation. Requires authentication.

post.summary: Create an API key (plan feature "api_keys"; returns the key once)

402.description: Feature not available on the current plan

get.summary: Get one API key (public fields only, no secret)

delete.summary: Revoke an API key (deactivates and soft-deletes)

get.summary: Download an attachment via a signed, expiring URL (no auth)

delete.summary: Delete an attachment (soft-delete; frees storage quota)

post.summary: Create a signed, expiring download URL (for sharing without auth)

200.description: Signed URL created: { url, token, expiresAt, expiresInSec }

get.description: Retrieves paginated, immutable audit logs for the tenant. Required for FDA 21 CFR Part 11 compliance. Requires read access to AuditLogs.

post.description: Public endpoint - no authentication or permission required. Rate limited to 3 attempts per hour to prevent abuse.

429.description: Too many requests - Rate limited (3 attempts per hour)

post.description: Public endpoint - no authentication or permission required. Rate limited to 5 attempts per 15 minutes. Account will be locked for 15 minutes after too many failed attempts. Token is revoked if brute force is detected.

429.description: Too many login attempts - Rate limited (5 attempts per 15 minutes)

post.description: Public endpoint - no authentication or permission required. Rate limited to 3 attempts per 15 minutes to prevent OTP abuse.

429.description: Too many requests - Rate limited (3 attempts per 15 minutes)

post.description: Public endpoint - no authentication or permission required. Requires valid OTP sent to email. Rate limited to 5 attempts per 5 minutes.

429.description: Too many requests - Rate limited (5 attempts per 5 minutes)

post.description: Requires authentication. Users can revoke their current session. No specific permission required - available to all authenticated users.

post.summary: Log out all sessions for the authenticated user
post.description: Requires authentication. Users can revoke all their active sessions. No specific permission required - available to all authenticated users.

post.summary: Issue a short-lived JWT for the socket.io handshake
post.description: The app JWT is stored in an httpOnly cookie unreadable by browser JS. This endpoint (cookie-authenticated via the frontend proxy) returns a short-lived token (5 minutes) to pass as `auth.token` when opening a socket.io connection.
Requires authentication. Verifies if the current token is valid. No specific permission required - available to all authenticated users.

post.summary: Update the password of the logged-in user
post.description: Requires authentication. Users can update their own password. Uses user:self:update permission implicitly.

post.summary: Check whether the supplied password matches
post.description: Requires authentication. Verifies if the supplied password matches the user's current password. No specific permission required - available to all authenticated users.

post.summary: Refresh an access token using a valid refresh token
post.description:
- Requires a valid, unexpired, non-revoked refresh token
- Returns a new access token AND a new refresh token (rotation)
- The old refresh token is revoked immediately
- Supports token binding via sessionId for extra security

post.summary: Initiate SSO login for a tenant
post.description: Starts the SSO/OIDC authentication flow for a specific tenant. Redirects user to the OIDC provider.

post.summary: Handle SSO callback from OIDC provider
post.description: Receives the authorization code from the OIDC provider, exchanges it for tokens, and establishes a session.

400.description: Invalid authorization code or state mismatch

post.summary: Handle SSO callback with tenant routing
post.description: Same as /sso/callback but includes tenant code in URL for multi-tenant routing.

post.summary: Initiate OIDC login for a tenant
post.description: Starts the OIDC authentication flow for a specific tenant.

post.summary: Handle OIDC callback with tenant routing

get.description: Returns the OpenID Connect discovery document or SAML metadata for the default tenant.
Returns SAML/OIDC metadata for a specific tenant.

404.description: Tenant or SSO configuration not found

200.description: Returns the MFA secret and QR code data URL

get.summary: List all background jobs for the tenant
Get status of a specific background job

get.description: Retrieves the active billing subscription for the current tenant. Requires read access to Billing.

patch.description: Updates the current subscription plan. Typically used to upgrade/downgrade plans. Requires update access to Billing.

get.description: Retrieves paginated invoice history for the tenant. Requires read access to Billing.

post.description: Receives Stripe events (invoice.paid, invoice.payment_failed, customer.subscription.updated/deleted) and reconciles subscription, invoice, and tenant state. Requires the raw request body.

get.description: Requires read access to calibration.

post.description: Requires write access to calibration.

get.description: Requires read access to calibration.

delete.description: Requires write access to calibration.

post.description: Requires write access to calibration. Accepts a file field containing the CSV.

get.description: Requires read access to calibration.

post.description: Requires write access to calibration.

get.summary: Get specific calibration record by ID
get.description: Requires read access to calibration.

delete.description: Requires write access to calibration.

get.summary: List devices due (or overdue) for calibration
get.description: Read-only preview of calibration devices the scheduler would act on. Scoped to the caller's tenant (super admins may pass allTenants=true). Requires read access to the Maintenance resource.

parameters.name: leadDays
parameters.description: Include devices due within this many days from now.

parameters.name: allTenants
parameters.description: Super admin only — scan across all tenants.

post.description: Creates a Preventative work order and a CALIBRATION notification for each due device (idempotent — devices with an open preventative work order are skipped). Scoped to the caller's tenant unless a super admin passes allTenants=true or a specific tenantId. Requires create access to the Maintenance resource.

get.summary: Publicly verify a certificate's authenticity (no auth)
get.description: Public endpoint (the target of the certificate QR code). Returns whether the certificate is found and valid (signed, not revoked, not expired), plus its integrity hash and issuance details.
Requires read access to certificate.

post.description: Requires write access to certificate.

get.description: Requires read access to certificate.
Requires read access to certificate.

delete.description: Requires write access to certificate.

post.description: Requires approve access to certificate.
Requires sign access to certificate.
Requires write access to certificate.

get.description: Requires read access to certificate. Renders the PDF (with a verification QR code) if it has not been generated yet.

post.summary: Generate (or regenerate) the certificate PDF document
post.description: Requires generate access to certificate. Renders the formal PDF and stores it against the certificate.

get.description: Public, unauthenticated list of PUBLISHED blog/news posts for the marketing site.

get.description: Public, unauthenticated fetch of a single PUBLISHED post (with sanitized HTML body and categories).
Public, unauthenticated list of content categories for the marketing site filters.
Lists all posts across every status. Requires read access to the Content resource.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Raw slug or title text to normalize and check

parameters.name: excludeId
parameters.description: Post id to exclude (so a post keeps its own slug while editing)

get.description: Retrieves any post (any status) by id with its categories. Requires read access to the Content resource.

get.description: Retrieves all custom domains configured for the tenant. Requires read access to CustomDomains.

domain.description: The custom domain to add (e.g., app.example.com)

delete.description: Removes a custom domain from the tenant. Requires write access to CustomDomains.

Returns aggregated metrics for the dashboard. Non-superadmin users always receive metrics scoped to their own tenant. SUPERADMIN receives global metrics with a per-tenant breakdown, and may optionally scope to a single tenant with the tenantId query parameter.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: (SUPERADMIN only) scope metrics to one tenant

get.description: Returns the data retention policy for the tenant.

put.description: Sets the data retention policy for the tenant. Super admin only.

get.description: Returns the legal-hold status for the tenant.

post.description: Enables legal hold for the tenant. Super admin only.

delete.description: Disables legal hold for the tenant. Super admin only.

post.description: Purges expired records for the tenant. Super admin only.
Masks PII fields for the specified records. Super admin only.
Anonymizes a dataset for the tenant. Super admin only.

get.description: Retrieves all RSA key pairs configured for the tenant for digital signatures. Requires read access to ESignature.

post.description: Generates a new RSA key pair for digital signatures. The private key is securely stored. Complies with 21 CFR Part 11 Section 11.50. Requires write access to ESignature.

label.description: Human-readable label for the key pair

delete.description: Revokes and deletes a key pair. Requires write access to ESignature.

get.description: Retrieves all digital signature workflows for the tenant. Requires read access to ESignature.

post.description: Creates a new digital signature workflow. Defines signers, signing order, and document references. Requires write access to ESignature.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific workflow. Requires read access to ESignature.

put.description: Updates a workflow (only if in draft or pending status). Requires write access to ESignature.

delete.description: Deletes a workflow (only if in draft status). Requires write access to ESignature.

post.description: Signs a document using the user's key pair and records the signature. Complies with 21 CFR Part 11 Section 11.10(a). Requires write access to ESignature.
Verifies the integrity and authenticity of a digital signature. Returns verification status and audit trail.

get.description: Retrieves the complete audit trail of all digital signatures for the tenant. Complies with 21 CFR Part 11 Section 11.10(e). Requires read access to ESignature.

get.summary: Get effective flags for a tenant
get.description: Returns the effective feature flags for the specified tenant.
Returns the catalog of available feature flag definitions.

get.summary: Check whether a flag is enabled
get.description: Returns whether the given flag is enabled for the tenant.

post.description: Sets a per-tenant flag override. Super admin only.

delete.description: Resets a per-tenant flag override to its default. Super admin only.

post.description: Seeds the tenant's default feature flags. Super admin only.

get.summary: Depreciation report (capex, accumulated depreciation, book value)
List asset finance records (with computed depreciation)

post.summary: Create an asset finance record for a device

409.description: Record already exists for this device

post.description: Initiates a data export request for the authenticated user's personal data. Complies with GDPR Article 20 (Data Portability). Requires authentication.
Submits a request to erase all personal data for the authenticated user. Complies with GDPR Article 17 (Right to Erasure) and CCPA Section 1798.105. Requires authentication.

confirmDeletion.description: Confirmation that user understands data will be permanently deleted

get.description: Retrieves the current status of a data erasure request. Requires authentication.

put.description: Updates the user's consent preferences for various data processing activities. Complies with GDPR Article 7 (Conditions for Consent). Requires authentication.

consents.description: Key-value pairs of consent identifiers and their status

get.description: Retrieves the complete consent history for the authenticated user. Complies with GDPR accountability principle. Requires authentication.
Retrieves the list of personal data processing activities for the tenant. Required under GDPR Article 30 (Records of Processing Activities). Requires authentication.

put.description: Submits a request to correct or rectify inaccurate personal data. Complies with GDPR Article 16 (Right to Rectification). Requires authentication.

corrections.description: Key-value pairs of data fields and their corrected values

post.description: Submits a request to restrict the processing of personal data. Complies with GDPR Article 18 (Right to Restriction of Processing). Requires authentication.
Ingests device telemetry readings. Public endpoint authenticated via device token in the x-iot-token header (not bearerAuth).

delete.description: Deletes an existing maintenance work order. Requires delete access to the Maintenance resource.

get.summary: Get all backups for a tenant
get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:read permission. Returns paginated list of backups with status, size, and metadata.

get.summary: Get backup statistics for a tenant
get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:read permission. Returns totals, completed/failed counts, total size, and the latest backup.

get.summary: Get details of a specific backup
get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:read permission. Returns detailed information about a specific backup including creator, size, and metadata.

delete.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:delete permission. Deletes the backup file and record.

get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:read permission. Downloads the ZIP file containing the backup data.

400.description: Backup is not ready for download

404.description: Backup not found or file missing

post.summary: Restore a backup for a tenant
post.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:update permission. Restores tenant data from a backup. Can optionally merge with existing data.

mergeData.description: Whether to merge with existing data instead of replacing

400.description: Backup is not ready for restore

get.description: Retrieves the complete hierarchical tree of all tenants and business units. Requires read access to TenantHierarchy.
Retrieves direct child tenants (business units) of a parent tenant. Requires read access to TenantHierarchy.
Retrieves the direct parent tenant of a child business unit. Requires read access to TenantHierarchy.

404.description: Tenant has no parent (is a root tenant)

put.description: Changes the parent tenant of a child business unit. Requires write access to TenantHierarchy.

newParentId.description: ID of the new parent tenant

delete.description: Removes the parent relationship, making the child tenant a root tenant. Requires write access to TenantHierarchy.

404.description: Tenant not found or already a root tenant

get.description: Retrieves all descendant tenants (recursive children) of a parent tenant. Requires read access to TenantHierarchy.
Retrieves all ancestor tenants (recursive parents) of a child business unit. Requires read access to TenantHierarchy.

404.description: Tenant has no ancestors (is a root tenant)

post.description: Creates a new child tenant (business unit) under a parent tenant. Requires write access to TenantHierarchy.

code.description: Unique code for the child tenant

400.description: Invalid input or code already exists

get.description: Retrieves all cross-tenant role assignments where users have roles spanning multiple tenants in the hierarchy. Requires read access to TenantHierarchy.
Returns the lifecycle status of the tenant.

post.description: Suspends the tenant. Super admin only.
Resumes the tenant. Super admin only.
Starts the grace period for the tenant. Super admin only.
Schedules deletion of the tenant. Super admin only.
Cancels a scheduled offboarding for the tenant. Super admin only.

get.description: Exports all data for the tenant. Super admin only.

get.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of users
get.description: Requires read access to User model with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: Identifier of the tenant the request belongs to

post.summary: Fetch details of a specific user by ID
post.description: Requires read access to User model. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

post.summary: Check if a username is available
post.description: Requires authentication. No specific permission required - available to all authenticated users.
Requires update access to User model with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.
Requires create access to User model with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

password.description: Password (must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number)

patch.description: Requires update access to User model. Self-check enabled. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

delete.description: Requires delete access to User model with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

post.summary: Upload an avatar for a user
post.description: Requires update access to User model. Self-check enabled.

400.description: No file uploaded or invalid file type

delete.description: Requires update access to User model. Self-check enabled.

get.description: Returns the user's role permissions, custom overrides, and the resolved effective permission per menu group.

post.summary: Assign or update a custom permission for a user
post.description: Upserts a per-user override on a menu group. permissionType "read" or "write" grants that access regardless of the user's role; "none" explicitly denies the menu even if the role grants it.

404.description: User or menu group not found

delete.description: Deletes the override so the user falls back to role inheritance.

get.description: Retrieves all vendors for the current tenant. Requires read access to the Vendors resource.

post.description: Creates a new vendor. Requires create access to the Vendors resource.

get.description: Retrieves a specific vendor by ID. Requires read access to the Vendors resource.

patch.description: Updates an existing vendor. Requires update access to the Vendors resource.

delete.description: Deletes an existing vendor. Requires delete access to the Vendors resource.

patch.description: Update a vendor's qualification status.

get.description: Requires read access to warehouse with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

post.description: Requires write access to warehouse. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

get.description: Requires read access to warehouse with tenant scope.

patch.description: Requires write access to warehouse. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

delete.description: Requires write access to warehouse. Performs soft delete.

get.summary: Get storage locations in a warehouse
get.description: Requires read access to warehouse. Returns all locations within the specified warehouse.

post.description: Requires write access to warehouse. Creates a new storage location within a warehouse.

patch.description: Requires write access to warehouse.

delete.description: Requires write access to warehouse. Performs soft delete.

post.description: Returns the options needed to begin a WebAuthn passkey registration.
Verifies the attestation response from a WebAuthn registration ceremony.
Returns the assertion options needed to begin a WebAuthn login ceremony.
Verifies the assertion response from a WebAuthn login ceremony.
Disables WebAuthn passkey authentication for the current user.

402.description: Feature not available on the current plan

get.summary: Get one webhook (public fields only, no secret)

patch.summary: Update a webhook (url, events, description, isActive)

get.summary: List delivery attempts for a webhook

post.summary: Send a synthetic test delivery to a webhook

get.summary: List workflow instances awaiting the current user's approval
get.description: Returns pending workflow instances whose current step requires the authenticated user's role.

post.summary: Approve or reject the current step of a workflow instance

200.description: Action recorded; instance advances, completes, or is rejected

400.description: Invalid payload or instance not pending

403.description: User's role cannot approve the current step

get.summary: List workflows for the tenant (with steps)

post.summary: Create a workflow (deactivates any existing active workflow for the same resource type)

get.summary: Get one workflow with its steps

put.summary: Update a workflow (name, active flag, or full steps replacement)

message.example: Something went wrong while running migrations

get.summary: Remove seeded data from the database

action.description: Action name (e.g., read, write, update, delete)
